palette.placeholder: Type a command, a service, an agent…

login.title: Private area
login.lead: Sign in to access your dashboard.

forbidden.title: This page is not open to you
forbidden.lead: Your account cannot open this screen. If you believe this is a mistake, ask an administrator for the matching permission.

noAccess.title: No access has been granted to you yet
noAccess.lead: Your account is active — it simply has no permissions yet. Ask an administrator to open the screens you need; they will appear the next time you sign in.
